name: Iso11783IL_PDDOnDataChanged
title: Iso11783IL_PDDOnDataChanged
syntax: void Iso11783IL_PDDOnDataChanged( dword ddi, dword elNum, double value );
description: This function can be implemented in the CAPL program. The function is called up by the interaction layer if a process variable has been changed with a value command via the CAN Bus.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: data dictionary identifier of the changed process variables
